name: Team Hood
subject: Updates from the campaign trail
body:
|
---
Team Hood has been working hard hitting the campaign trail to spread Jim's message to every corner of the state, and we are excited to share some of the highlights with you.
Friend,

Team Hood has been working hard hitting the campaign trail to spread Jim's message to every corner of the state, and we are excited to share some of the highlights with you.

Jim kicked off the month in Oxford at Mississippi American Legion Boys State and later traveled to Hattiesburg for Mississippi Magnolia Girls State, two events he has enjoyed speaking at for the past 15 years.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/i_mRsbgG-HWpvM5auHxGBttuGItooojAzqrtdolpl38=/r84Xp6YA1XwQw-EJtOhtrMDeegMK9fJA1eUl3sinhOE=?refcode=20190622&amount=25)
---
He also traveled down to the coast to meet with the Mississippi Professional Educators Board of Directors to discuss his vision for the state and public education, and the Mississippi Association of Supervisors to discuss his commitment to strengthening partnerships between state and country leaders to better serve Mississippians.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/i_mRsbgG-HWpvM5auHxGBttuGItooojAzqrtdolpl38=/r84Xp6YA1XwQw-EJtOhtrMDeegMK9fJA1eUl3sinhOE=?refcode=20190622&amount=25)
---
Our awesome volunteers have also been out spreading the word at community events in Corinth, Jackson, and Flowood.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/i_mRsbgG-HWpvM5auHxGBttuGItooojAzqrtdolpl38=/r84Xp6YA1XwQw-EJtOhtrMDeegMK9fJA1eUl3sinhOE=?refcode=20190622&amount=25)
---
Jim **can** win this race. We've got a long way till November but we're putting in the work and we know we can get there with your continued support!

Thanks,
Team Hood

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/i_mRsbgG-HWpvM5auHxGBttuGItooojAzqrtdolpl38=/r84Xp6YA1XwQw-EJtOhtrMDeegMK9fJA1eUl3sinhOE=?refcode=20190622&amount=25)
---
|

---

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/i_mRsbgG-HWpvM5auHxGBttuGItooojAzqrtdolpl38=/exxS0KDs-50PPukflBJ9LpDXESwW0I0RIjIykejz3gQ=). Friends of Jim Hood
P.O. Box 16647
Jackson MS 39236 United States

name: Action-Alert@EdMarkey.com
subject: OPEN AND SIGN: Demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| | | **NEWSWEEK:** **SENATE MAJORITY LEADER MITCH MCCONNELL HAS A PLAN TO OVERTURN ROE V. WADE**

_" Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell outlined his efforts to stack the courts against Roe v. Wade in an interview with an anti-abortion rights video channel this week. The Kentucky Republican also indicated that the Senate would likely hold more votes this session on the fate of abortion in the U.S. including on 'some kind of legislation related to Planned Parenthood.'"_

[_**TAKE ACTION: Add your name to demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dddf/693b8b0a/5884ad17/72de8d5b/370081225/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-reproductivefreedom-ja%3Frefcode%3D062219%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
Hello -- Almost five decades ago, Roe v. Wade protected a woman's right to make her own health care decisions.

But now, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and GOP lawmakers are doing everything they can to erode reproductive freedoms across the country.

We can't let ultraconservatives overturn Roe v. Wade or allow them to undermine women's access to comprehensive health care - we need to fight back now before it's too late to act.

_**[Sign the petition: Demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dddf/693b8b0a/5884ad17/72de8d5b/370081225/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-reproductivefreedom-ja%3Frefcode%3D062219%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**_

From states like Georgia, Mississippi, Ohio and Iowa effectively banning abortions before women know they are pregnant, to threats of defunding Planned Parenthood at every level of government, to President Trump restricting birth control access - far-right attacks on women have grown bolder and more extreme.

And unless Americans stand together and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, they're attacks on women's rights will only get worse.

Speak up now and stand up to Mitch McConnell and GOP lawmakers and say NO MORE!

[_**Sign the petition: Demand Congress protect reproductive freedoms!**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dddf/693b8b0a/5884ad17/72de8d5b/370081225/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectReproductiveFreedoms/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-reproductivefreedom-ja%3Frefcode%3D062219%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

"" From states like Georgia, Mississippi, Ohio and Iowa effectively banning abortions before women know they are pregnant, to threats of defunding Planned Parenthood at every level of government, to President Trump restricting birth control access - far-right attacks on women have grown bolder and more extreme. And unless Americans stand together and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, they're attacks on women's rights will only get worse. Speak up now and stand up to Mitch McConnell and GOP lawmakers and say NO MORE! "" | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0738/72412298/4255e7cb/6101a2f1/1516136723/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9zcGxpdGhhcnJpc29uIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IlZQUF9FTV9GUl8xOTA2MjJfR3JhaGFtVkhhcnJpc29uX1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_splitharrison?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_190622_GrahamVHarrison_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_190622_GrahamVHarrison_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_190622_GrahamVHarrison_U1_X1") Graham was an outspoken critic of Trump during the 2016 race, calling him a "race-baiting, xenophobic, and religious bigot". name: Maddie Collins
subject: Why Wilmot is running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Whenever my husband, Wilmot Collins, sees an opportunity to give back to the state and country that gave our family so many opportunities, he welcomes it with open arms.
That's what led him to serve in the National Guard, Army reserves, and Navy reserves. It's what inspired him to run for Mayor of Helena. And it's why he's in this race now to join the Senate.
**[Wilmot is running for Senate because Montanans needs another champion to fight for their values in Washington, D.C. Can you help him win with a $5 contribution now?](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190622&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
[****](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190622&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Wilmot knows this race won't be easy. But he also knows that we can win. While some may call Montana a red state, we already have a Democratic Senator and Governor. Montanans vote for the person, not the party, and my husband is just the kind of person we need leading our future.
When we fled from Liberia as refugees 25 years ago, we made Montana our home. I have loved this state from the day I first came here as a young foreign exchange student to today, and I am forever grateful for the many opportunities this state has given my family to create a better life. No matter what, I want the best for Montana--that's why I want Wilmot to be our next Senator.
[**Will you stand with my husband Wilmot and donate $5 to his campaign now?**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190622&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
With endless appreciation,
Maddie Collins

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190622&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"Mexico’s Senate voted overwhelmingly in favor of approving the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement on trade, a deal that would replace the..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a9891b6a1a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Mexico Becomes First Country to Approve USMCA](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d19d3beee&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Mexico’s Senate voted overwhelmingly in favor of approving the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement on trade, a deal that would replace the North American Free Trade Agreement,” Zachary Halaschak reports. “[Canadian] Foreign Minister Chrystia Freeland said last week that Canada would be working ‘in tandem’ with the U.S. in hammering out final passage of the historic trade deal.”

**Share:** [President Trump hosts Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d67da8ca42&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [How Trump’s Tax Cuts Are Helping the Middle Class](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd6d7af6eb&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Signal_
“Steve, it’s almost like a light switch was flicked from off to on the day after the election,” one small business owner says about the effect of the Trump Presidency on his company. Tax reform expert Stephen Moore say that “the economic ramifications [of tax cuts] have been almost universally positive . . . Almost 90% of taxpayers don’t have to itemize their deduction any longer because we doubled the standard deduction.”

**🎬** [Reagan economist Art Laffer receives Medal of Freedom from President Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aeea6b42d4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Ivanka Trump, Wilbur Ross: President Redoubles Efforts to Ensure Good Jobs for All](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4930457baa&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Salisbury Post_
“With a record 48 states registering unemployment rates below 5%, President Trump’s economic agenda is paying off,” which means more opportunities for job seekers, Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross write. As of today, the President’s efforts have resulted in more than 250 companies pledging more than 9 million new training opportunities for American workers and students.

**🎬****Ivanka Trump in Charlotte:** [“We are approaching 10 million commitments” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ab05df9ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Pence Says Maduro ‘Must Go’ as Navy Aids Venezuelan Refugees](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58832da3c9&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“Vice President Mike Pence called anew for the ouster of Venezuela’s embattled President Nicholas Maduro on Tuesday, asserting that the socialist leader’s removal is the only way democracy can be restored in the South American nation,” Carlo Muñoz reports. “We are with our neighbors and we will stand with [the Venezuelan people],” the Vice President said.

**🎬 Vice President Pence:** [U.S. compassion “sets sail” with the USNS _Comfort_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc4f4b40a5&e=3ee4985eea)[ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6963b6798&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Bahrain Workshop on Palestinian Economy is the Opportunity of a Generation](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e3bc126b1&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
“This is exciting—an opportunity of a generation. We are grateful to the Kingdom of Bahrain for extending the invitation to [the Trump Administration] to host the June 25 and 26 workshop with them for the benefit of Palestinians and others in the region, offering us a unique opportunity to communicate our economic vision,” White House Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt writes. President Trump’s goal is to present “a realistic resolution and a brighter future for all those burdened with this conflict.”
---
|
---
| [Hundreds of Migrant Caravan Members Found to Have US Criminal Histories: DHS Files](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2e776054d&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Hundreds of illegal immigrants attempting to cross the southern border as part of massive migrant caravans were found to have criminal histories in the U.S., according to newly obtained Department of Homeland Security documents,” Brooke Singman reports. One caravan of nearly 8,000 migrants arrived south of California in December 2018. “660 of them had U.S. criminal convictions—with 40 convicted of assault or aggravated assault with a deadly weapon, and three convicted of murder.”
---
|
---
| [President Trump Could Revolutionize the Private Health Insurance Market](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97f24f2997&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“Last week, the White House finalized a rule that allows employers to fund health reimbursement arrangements (HRAs) that can be used by workers to buy their own coverage on the individual market,” healthcare expert Avik Roy writes. “Some in Washington want to take health insurance choices away from workers and replace them with the diktats of politicians. The Trump initiative moves in the opposite direction.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb12c867c3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8a9c739747&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f791323786)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Act now to protect our health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Please read:

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-pet-june?refcode=rtw_20190622_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

The Trump administration is once again trying to strip Americans of their health care -- and I need your help to stop them.

For years, Donald Trump and the GOP-controlled Senate have tried to dismantle our health care system and deny coverage to anyone with a pre-existing condition. Now, they're trying to destabilize the insurance market by expanding "junk" health insurance plans.

Junk plans discriminate against people with pre-existing conditions and cover almost nothing: No coverage for substance use treatment or maternity care, and very little coverage for mental health care. They allow insurance companies to drive up costs and then fail to provide people with the services they need.

**My colleague Senator Tammy Baldwin and I are speaking up and calling for a Senate vote on the No Junk Plans Act. This is common-sense legislation that would help Americans -- including those with pre-existing conditions -- get the care they need.**

**[Friend, will you add your name to show your support for the No Junk Plans Act? Our access to high-quality, affordable health care is under attack. Tammy and I are counting on you to raise your voice and join this fight right now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fd8c/c1f7015/628e03d7/11474ad1/2883009438/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201906_junkplans?source=rtw_20190622_em-full")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fd8c/c1f7015/628e03d7/11474ad1/2883009438/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201906_junkplans?source=rtw_20190622_em-full")** The GOP has tried and failed countless times to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- so now, they're just trying to go around it by pushing these junk plans.

**It 's a simple principle we're fighting for: no one should ever have to choose between putting food on the table or paying for their health care.**

But if Donald Trump and the GOP get their way, more and more Americans will be forced to rely on these junk plans. We can't sit back here. We need everyone fighting together now.

**[Before it's too late, add your name to call for a Senate vote on the No Junk Plans Act. We've saved our health care before -- and we're counting on you to help us do it again.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fd8c/c1f7015/628e03d7/11474ad1/2883009438/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201906_junkplans?source=rtw_20190622_em-full")**

subject: An Exciting Time in South Carolina

body:
| | | |
---
| Friend -- Thank you all for your continued support! Without you, this campaign wouldn’t be here. As it is, we are at #9 in the latest CNN rankings and climbing fast. :) I’m spending this last weekend before the debate in South Carolina, one of the early primary states. We are at 3% here. This is my second trip to the state, and I’m excited to get to meet even more voters here. Yesterday, I spent time meeting with local press and politicians before heading to a Fish Fry hosted by Representative Jim Clyburn. Almost all the other candidates were there, so it was a great warm-up for next week. I must say that every time I share the stage with the other candidates, I feel more relaxed and ready for the debates. On stage, I talked about the biggest problems facing the country, but there are also many other local and national issues I didn't have a chance to talk about. South Carolina is one of many states to see their teachers strike or protest. I can’t say I blame them. We expect teachers to work miracles in the classroom, when studies show that up to 70% of a student’s outcomes are related to non-school factors. We also know that teacher quality is one of the most important factors determining student outcomes within a school, and yet we don’t pay teachers nearly enough. When I’m President, we’ll be sure to give teachers a raise and invest in programs that will improve quality, such as mentorship and professional development programs. And, of course, the Freedom Dividend will reduce financial stress across America, freeing our children up to stop worrying at home and start learning at school. Another policy the teachers were promoting is increasing investment in mental health in schools. Every school should have a mental health professional. We’re in a mental health crisis right now, especially among teens. We need to invest the resources to make sure that our children are healthy during their adolescence. We are beyond excited for the week to come. I'll be on the Colbert Show on Monday night with a special announcement. And then it will be off to Miami for the debates! History has opened a door for us - let's take full advantage and establish a more positive direction for the country.
---
| -Andrew

Instead, we’re building this campaign with people, one grassroots
contribution at a time.

So we’re asking. Can you

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Joan=20Perry=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Head to the polls, this week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joan Perry for Congress, All rights reserved
body:
| | | | [ ](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=64dd25fb05&e=0bf1d0f47f)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

What an exciting week it has been! With the start of early voting, I have been energized by many of you taking time to head to the polls. Thank you for all of your kind wishes throughout this early voting period, but it isn't over yet. **Every vote counts and we need your vote to secure a victory for our district. **

Have you made a plan to vote yet? Our polling shows this race is tied, which means we need every single vote. Every one!

For those of you who have voted, I have another favor to ask. Can you please encourage your friends, families and neighbors to vote too? **I challenge you to reach at least 5 friends and remind them how critical their vote is. **Send them a text or email and [give them the information they need to vote](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=015d869ab3&e=0bf1d0f47f). We need your help to make sure the people of our district have a reliably conservative voice in Washington.

**This week I was also encouraged by the[endorsement of Rep. Phil Shepard of Onslow County](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=aba7209d35&e=0bf1d0f47f). **His steadfast commitment to conservative principles is admirable and I am humbled by his endorsement.**I am also grateful for the support I received from Joe Anne Jones, wife of former Congressman Walter Jones.[Read what she said here](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=e3f4e7bad3&e=0bf1d0f47f). **Walter Jones had a deep love for our district and he and Joe Anne deserve immense gratitude for their service.

This week has been unforgettable and I have you all to thank for it. Our district is like no other and as I've learned throughout the years, we take pride in being from Eastern, NC. But now is the time to turn that pride into action. **We need you to invest in the future of our district by making a plan to VOTE!**
Find your county's early voting location and times [here](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=fd9993672e&e=0bf1d0f47f) and don't forget to remind at least 5 friends that we are still in the early voting period.

Thank you,

Joan Perry

PS: Can you help me call voters in our district? You can call from anywhere with our "phones from home" call software. Reply to this email if you can help us turn out the vote!

body:
#
In just one week we face our FEC fundraising deadline. That’s when we’ll close the books on the quarter and report publicly how much money we’ve raised, and how many people have stepped up to own a piece of our campaign.

| Friend,

This Thursday marks the biggest day of this campaign since we launched: **the day John takes the stage for the first presidential debate.**

John is looking forward to introducing himself to the millions of voters tuning in to this race for the first time, and to bringing attention to the issues that matter most in our country today--from our gun violence epidemic, to assaults on reproductive rights, to our crisis of division under this president.

**To that end, John has asked us to help him bring _your_ voice to the debate stage. Can you take a moment to share your thoughts on what you want to hear John talk about on stage this Thursday?** [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637717b7/691c9bd/6d92c72a/11a4390a/3104580319/VEsE/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/tell-john-what-you-want-to-hear-on-the-debate-stage?source=20190622")

subject: Bold Solutions for Georgians’ Healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beach for Congress |
body:

| |

| Peter, I am running for Congress to deliver bold solutions to the people of Georgia. One of the biggest questions I get asked on the campaign trail is what will I do to help save Georgians from skyrocketing healthcare costs. First and foremost, we must finally repeal and replace Obamacare, which the last Republican congress failed to do. Their failure is hitting us in the pocketbook and providing fewer options in healthcare. Unfortunately, my opponent Lucy McBath and her allies in Congress are determined to double-down on the disastrous, government-run Obamacare. They even want to eliminate every employer-based insurance plan! [**Can I count on your support to repeal and replace Obamacare?**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidiyda-udyuidthb-j/) I am the only candidate who has delivered real results when it comes to healthcare in our district. I know that government controlled healthcare is not the solution – but rather expanded patient choice and competition. [Pitch in just $5 today](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidiyda-udyuidthb-t/) to help enact bold solutions to fix healthcare. We must stand together to stop Lucy McBath’s attempt to force Medicare for All on the people of Georgia. That’s not a bold solution, but a recipe for disaster. Thank you for your continued support. -Brandon P.S. Our End of Quarter fundraising deadline is June 30th and we need your support to meet our goal. [**Consider donating today.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidiyda-udyuidthb-i/) [Donate Today](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jidiyda-udyuidthb-d/) |
